evaluations.name: Commuter Double-Peak Pattern
evaluations.recommendation: Confirm ventilation fans track occupancy sensor data.

evaluations.name: Overnight Lighting Base Load
evaluations.recommendation: Motion-activated lighting can reduce overnight load by 60-70%.

evaluations.name: Weekend Consumption Anomaly
evaluations.message: Weekend usage is 0.989% of weekday — expected <60%.
evaluations.recommendation: Review weekend HVAC schedules and unoccupied equipment.

evaluations.name: Ventilation Over-Run Detection
evaluations.recommendation: CO2-linked ventilation control eliminates idle fan run-time.

evaluations.name: Weather Sensitivity Check
evaluations.message: Energy use is 39% correlated with outdoor temperature.
evaluations.recommendation: Optimize HVAC based on temperature forecast to reduce reactive energy spikes.

evaluations.name: High Consumption During Low-Occupancy Hours
evaluations.recommendation: Configure occupancy sensors and timer-based shutdowns.
